# Waterford Auto Shine

> Professional hand wash and auto detailing in Waterford Township, Michigan. Locally owned shop serving Oakland County since day one.

## Business Info

- Name: Waterford Auto Shine
- Address: 3496 Pontiac Lake Rd, Waterford Township, MI 48328
- Phone: (248) 618-8999
- Email: Waterfordautoshine@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM, Sunday Closed
- Website: https://waterfordautoshine.com

## Services

### Interior Detail
Deep interior cleaning including vacuum, steam clean seats, carpet shampoo with hot water extraction, leather cleaner and conditioner, plastics and vinyl treatment, headliner cleaning, and streak-free windows.
- Sedan: $200
- Midsize / Trucks: $225
- Large SUV / Minivan: $275

### Exterior Detail
Hand wash and dry, door jambs, rim and tire cleaning, tire shine, and hand wax application using the two-bucket method to protect your paint.
- Sedan: $75
- Midsize / Trucks: $100
- Large SUV / Minivan: $125

### Complete Detail
Everything in interior and exterior detail, plus clay bar treatment, sealant application, compound and polish, and smoke removal.
- Sedan: $325
- Midsize: $350
- Large: $375+

## Vehicles Served
Sedans, trucks, SUVs, and minivans. No boats, motorcycles, or RVs.

## Service Areas
Waterford Township, Pontiac, Clarkston, White Lake, Commerce Township, West Bloomfield, Bloomfield Hills, Auburn Hills, Lake Orion, Oxford, Ortonville, Holly, Davisburg, Drayton Plains, Union Lake, Keego Harbor, Sylvan Lake, Troy

## Reviews
4.8 stars from 45+ Google reviews.
